narrative:
Northwood City has 3,407 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.8 percentage points.
